name: apify
description: Run Apify actors for web scraping and automation and fetch their dataset results

tools.name: List Actors
tools.description: List actors in your Apify account

my.description: Only return actors owned by you (false includes actors you have access to)

offset.description: Number of actors to skip for pagination

historicalSummary.omitted: actor stats, version details, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Run Actor (Sync)
tools.description: Run an actor, wait for it to finish (up to 300s), and return its dataset items (consumes platform credits)

actorId.description: Actor ID or username~actorname, e.g. apify~web-scraper

timeout.description: Run timeout in seconds (overrides the actor default)

memory.description: Memory limit in megabytes (power of 2, e.g. 1024)

format.description: Result format: json, csv, xlsx, html, xml, or rss

input.description: Actor input JSON sent as the request body — see the actor's input schema, e.g. {"startUrls":[{"url":"https://example.com"}]}

tools.name: Get Run
tools.description: Get the status and details of an actor run, including its defaultDatasetId

tools.name: List Runs
tools.description: List recent actor runs in your account

offset.description: Number of runs to skip for pagination

tools.name: Get Dataset Items
tools.description: Fetch items from a dataset produced by an actor run

offset.description: Number of items to skip for pagination

clean.description: Return only non-empty items and skip hidden fields

format.description: Result format: json, csv, xlsx, html, xml, or rss

prompts.title: Scrape a website
prompts.prompt: Run an Apify actor to scrape a website I specify and summarize the extracted data.

prompts.title: Check recent runs
prompts.prompt: List my recent Apify actor runs with their statuses and fetch the dataset items of the latest successful one.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Apify API Setup

steps.title: Create an Apify account
steps.description: Sign up at https://console.apify.com — the free plan includes monthly platform credits, enough for testing small actor runs.

steps.title: Copy your API token
steps.description: In the Apify Console go to Settings → API & Integrations (https://console.apify.com/settings/integrations) and copy your personal API token (apify_api_...).

steps.title: Store the token
steps.description: Add it to your .env file as APIFY_TOKEN=apify_api_...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Actors tool. To run a store actor you have not used before, reference it as username~actorname (e.g. apify~web-scraper) — each actor's input schema is on its store page.

notes: Actor runs consume platform credits based on compute, memory, and storage — check the actor's pricing on the Apify Store
Run Actor (Sync) waits up to 300 seconds; for longer scrapes start the run asynchronously in the Apify Console and fetch results with Get Dataset Items
Responses are wrapped in a 'data' property; dataset item responses are plain arrays
